note: v391: Decluttered the mobile bottom nav. It grew to 8 cramped, truncated tabs — now it shows the core five (Home, Invoices, Customers, Expenses) plus a 'More' button that opens a sheet with the rest (Statements, Mileage, Time, Budget). Everything stays one tap away; nothing is truncated. The More tab highlights when you're on one of its pages, and it hides itself if all those sections are turned off in Settings. The desktop sidebar is unchanged — it still lists every section.
